name: Chronic Gastritis
definition: Chronic inflammatory disease of gastric mucosa
etiology: Helicobacter pylori infection, long-term use of NSAIDs, improper diet, psychological factors
symptoms: Upper abdominal bloating, pain, acid reflux, nausea, loss of appetite
treatment_principles: Eradicate H. pylori, protect gastric mucosa, symptomatic treatment, lifestyle adjustment
prevention_advice: Regular diet, avoid irritating foods, quit smoking and limit alcohol, manage stress
